sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from optimal f (Equation 2.11) scaled daily by equity changes relative to 1-unit baseline. Specific f value not provided by author; requires calculation from historical win rate and payoff ratio.

source_rule_text: Position size in dollars (f$) is calculated from optimal fin dollars determined by Equation 2.11, then adjusted daily based on equity changes relative to the 1-unit component baseline.
